positive: A highly detailed, symmetric illustration of stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna set against a deep cosmic nebula background. The composition must feature a central mandala-like arrangement of glowing, fractal-patterned flowers, intertwined with elegant, geometric silhouetted butterflies and delicate vine structures. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of neon cyan, deep magenta, electric violet, and black, mimicking stained glass or etched art. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau ornamentation and modern cosmic abstractism, ensuring strong, clean silhouettes and perfect symmetry suitable for a t-shirt print. Studio quality, 8k, vector precision.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, blur, grain, low contrast, blurry, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, amateur
